metadata.name: codelldb
metadata.summary: Launch CodeLLDB in debugpy to debug rust code.

modules.name: codelldb
documentation: NOTE: DO NOT use third-party libraries in this file,

functions.name: codelldb.debug
documentation:
Launch CodeLLDB to debug rust code.

If the value indicated by [VSCODE_RUST_DEBUG_VARNAME][codelldb.VSCODE_RUST_DEBUG_VARNAME] is not `1`, this is a no-op.

Raises:
    DebugError: If the provided environment variables cannot be correctly parsed.

Note:
    If failed to connect to the lldb rpc server, a warning message will be logged instead of raising an exception.

variables.name: codelldb.VSCODE_RUST_DEBUG_VARNAME
documentation: Whether to enable Rust debugging, set to `1` to enable, `0` to disable.

variables.name: codelldb.VSCODE_LLDB_RPC_SERVER_HOST_VARNAME
documentation: The host of the CodeLLDB rpc server.

variables.name: codelldb.VSCODE_LLDB_RPC_SERVER_PORT_VARNAME
documentation: The port of the CodeLLDB rpc server.

variables.name: codelldb.VSCODE_LLDB_RPC_SERVER_TOKEN_VARNAME
documentation: The secret token of the CodeLLDB rpc server.
